docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY STONE, LESTER AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN DOT CORPORATION WALGREEN COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STONE, LESTER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-12-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN DOT CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-12-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LESTER STONE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS GREEN DOT CORPORATION AND WALGREEN COMPANY ARE NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STONE, LESTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN DOT CORPORATION WALGREEN COMPANY $156.95 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $156.95, GREEN DOT CORP., ONLY IS FOUND LIABLE FOR PLAINTIFF'SDAMAGES. WALGREENS DID NOT BREACH DUTY OWED TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
